claimText: India's first indigenously developed HPV test kits for cervical cancer screening were validated by the Department of Biotechnology (DBT).
evidenceExcerpt: India's first indigenously developed HPV test kits for cervical cancer screening were validated by DBT.
examUse: Statement-based question on indigenous medical technologies and their validating authorities.
distractorHooks: Validated by ICMR instead of DBT
India relies entirely on imported HPV test kits

claimText: Persistent infection with high-risk Human Papillomavirus (HPV) is the most common cause of cervical cancer.
evidenceExcerpt: While the immune system usually clears it, persistent infection with high-risk HPV can cause abnormal cells leading to cancer, most commonly cervical cancer.
examUse: Statement-based question on the etiology of cervical cancer.
distractorHooks: Cervical cancer is primarily caused by bacterial infections
All HPV infections inevitably lead to cervical cancer

claimText: There is currently no medical treatment for the Human Papillomavirus (HPV) infection itself.
evidenceExcerpt: There is currently no treatment for HPV infection.
examUse: Statement-based question on the treatment and management of viral STIs.
distractorHooks: HPV infection can be cured with a specific course of antiviral drugs
Antibiotics are the primary treatment for HPV
